en: What's a noun for a standard or pattern of behavior that's typical in society Norm
ko: 사회에서 전형적인 행동 기준이나 패턴을 나타내는 명사는? Norm.

en: Wearing jeans to the office has become the norm in many workplaces but a few decades ago it
ko: 많은 직장에서 청바지를 입고 출근하는 게 일반적이 됐지만

en: just wasn't done This word means to run away quickly to escape danger
ko: 몇 십 년 전에는 안 그랬어. 위험을 피해 빨리 도망간다는 뜻의 단어는?

en: Villagers had to flee their homes during the flood What's a verb meaning to demand firmly or refuse to
ko: Flee. 홍수 때 주민들은 집을 떠나야 했어.

en: give up Insist She insists on paying for dinner every time
ko: 단호하게 요구하거나 포기하지 않는다는 동사는? Insist.
